compositionPolicy.precedence: Child semantics, accessible-name attributes, style values, and native props are authoritative.
compositionPolicy.events: Child handlers run first; slot handlers run unless the child prevents default.
compositionPolicy.refs: Forwarded and child refs receive the same concrete DOM node.
compositionPolicy.invalidChildren: Fragments and non-elements fail with a precise error.
compositionPolicy.advantage: Child-first cancellable events, deterministic context attributes, refs, classes, styles, semantics, and names are merged under one documented precedence contract.
compositionPolicy.enhancementOptOut: Omitting any Slot-owned event handler adds no listener or event; the child handler and all native semantics remain unchanged.
